channel.title: Dropout Presents
channel.description: Latest releases from Dropout Presents on Dropout.tv

item.title: Get Your Act Together with Michael Cruz Kayne
item.description:
Michael Cruz Kayne discusses the impact of grief and how that shaped his new comedy special.

Duration: 11:10

Tags: Dropout Presents, stand up comedy, improv, laughing, michael cruz kayne, death, grief, sadness, tragedy, pregnancy, family, parents, tutoring, optimism, powerpoint, ted talks, dark comedy, josh sharp, behind the scenes

item.title: Mark Vigeant: The Best Man Show
item.description:
Mark Vigeant examines loneliness, toxic masculinity, and the meaning of love as best man Paul Rose.

Duration: 58:05

Tags: Dropout Presents, stand up comedy, improv, laughing, mark vigeant, weddings, speeches, marriage, relationships, love and romance, loneliness, toxic masculinity, existentialism, absurd, chaos, off the rails, sam reich, katie marovitch, ross bryant, demi adejuyigbe

item.title: Get Your Act Together with Mark Vigeant
item.description:
Mark Vigeant talks about his improv beginnings and the inspiration for The Best Man Show.

Duration: 10:47

Tags: Dropout Presents, stand up comedy, improv, laughing, mark vigeant, weddings, speeches, marriage, relationships, love and romance, loneliness, toxic masculinity, existentialism, absurd, chaos, off the rails, kelly song, sam reich, behind the scenes
